prompt_md: You are assembling a well-structured prompt that asks a model to classify a customer message into a fixed set of labels and return a parseable result. Arrange the fragments below into the recommended order: role/policy first, then the task, then the data wrapped in delimiters, then the few-shot examples, and finally the explicit output-format instruction.

items: Examples: <message>The app crashes on startup.</message> -> technical ; <message>Do you ship to Canada?</message> -> other
System: You are a message classifier for a support inbox.
Respond with exactly one word and no other text.
Your task: classify the customer message into one of: billing, technical, other.
Message to classify: <message>My card was charged twice this month.</message>
